title: Alton Local E6L5 overhead line, S37 Consent, Electricity Act 1989
body: "Secretary of State’s screening decisions in accordance with the Electricity Works (Environmental Impact Assessment) (England and Wales) Regulations 2017.  Date of decision  4 April 2025  Location   AltonHampshire   Type of project / consent requested  Section 37 consent to install or keep installed an electric line. "
